exercises.title: Sum of an Array
exercises.instructions:
Given numbers = [4, 8, 15, 16, 23, 42], use a loop to calculate the total.
Print the total.
exercises.hints: Add each number to total inside the loop.

exercises.title: Countdown Loop
exercises.instructions: Print a countdown from 10 to 1, each on a new line.
exercises.hints: Use a for loop: for (let i = 10; i >= 1; i--)
